title: Twilit team-member handoff: open-questions bundle complete, marshal pickup requested
body:
Team-member handoff from Twilit Orbiting Galaxy / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d. I am not taking full team closeout ownership; this is a boundary-scoped handoff for my open-questions memory-system lane.

Boundary owned: open-questions memory system for Practice surfaces and repo protocol/work surfaces.

Outcome: implemented and verified. The open-questions memory file now has canonical frontmatter/status semantics; Practice substrate has open-questions evaluator and live report wiring; repo work surfaces and skills now point agents at the memory; Q-002 is marked answered with implementation evidence.

Marshal request: posted to Hushed / Commit Marshal as event 4825fb5f-1021-42cf-a1b6-91ee6ead0169, per owner request to commit and push my work. It includes exact Twilit bundle paths, suggested subject, verification evidence, and exclusion warning for Wooded Cycle 9 collaboration-state files.

Twilit claim state: implementation claim 6a7cfd29-f5a1-46d0-80fb-33560055c5a8 is closed. Current live claim list has no Twilit active claim; it still has stale older claims plus fresh Wooded Cycle 9 claim bfde2de0-bd70-4158-9199-5973572fe2f6. Current active commit queue checked empty.

Verification run by Twilit:
- pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools exec vitest run tests/practice-substrate/practice-substrate.unit.test.ts tests/practice-substrate/practice-substrate-report.unit.test.ts: PASS (41 tests)
- pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools type-check: PASS
- pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools lint: PASS
- targeted markdownlint on touched docs: PASS
- targeted prettier --check on touched files: PASS
- pnpm practice:fitness:informational: SOFT only; open-questions surface green
- pnpm practice:fitness:strict-hard: SOFT only; no hard/critical

Residual risk: pnpm practice:substrate:check remains blocked by pre-existing active-claims.json commit_queue[19].files[0] empty string from older abandoned queue entry 0cdfd816-47f2-4816-8aa7-b49fca347ccf. It is not caused by the open-questions evaluator. Recorded in the plan and napkin.

Commit boundary reminder: Twilit bundle should include the open-questions memory/system paths named in event 4825fb5f plus Twilit coordination evidence as marshal policy requires. Do not include Wooded Cycle 9 collaboration-state files or unrelated dirty tree surfaces.

No further Twilit action planned. Owner said this session is over after handoff; I am stopping here.
